verdict.answer_first: A states the actionable answer immediately: "Rename a branch both places in four steps" followed by the exact command sequence.
verdict.decisiveness: A commits to a clear recommended flow: "git branch -m...", "git push -u origin new-name", "git push origin --delete old-name"; B mixes a combined push plus an additional upstream push.
verdict.actionability: A is easier to act on right now because it gives the minimal ordered commands and sets upstream before deleting the old remote branch.
